commands: sh -c 'vp_bin=$(command -v vp) && node_path=$(command -v node) && node_bin=$(mktemp -d) && ln -s "$node_path" "$node_bin/node" && sanitized_path="$node_bin:/bin:/usr/bin" && PATH="$sanitized_path" node --version >/dev/null && if PATH="$sanitized_path" command -v pnpm >/dev/null; then echo "pnpm unexpectedly available on sanitized PATH"; exit 1; fi && PATH="$sanitized_path" "$vp_bin" test --slowTestThreshold 10000'
